scripts.start:dev: cd ../.. && NODE_ENV=development APP=shop nest start shop --watch
scripts.docker:build:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml up --build
scripts.docker:start:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml up
scripts.docker:db:generate:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml exec -w /app/apps/shop shop npm run db:generate --
scripts.docker:migrate:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml run --rm migrate
scripts.docker:seed:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml run --rm seed
scripts.docker:down:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml down
scripts.docker:start:prod:debug: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_prod -f compose.yml --profile debug up app-debug
scripts.docker:migrate:prod: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_prod -f compose.yml run --rm migrate
scripts.docker:seed:prod: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_prod -f compose.yml run --rm seed
scripts.docker:down:prod:debug: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_prod -f compose.yml --profile debug down
